Download for free

Enter the Coach Bowman Challenge

In the Month of April, we will be hosting the #CoachBowmanChallenge, a month-long giveaway where we will be awarding 2 winners every week with an exclusive prize pack.

Prizes: ~$250 Per Winner

The chance to win a prize pack that includes: Exclusive Coach Bowman Training Tank, Tripod, One Year Coach Bowman Subscription, and a $100 Amamzon Giftcard.

The Contest: Three Skill Challenge

Capture your favorite three skills within the Coach Bowman app. Think you have the most unique sequence? Show us what you got.

Two New Winners in 0 Days

Apr 1 Apr 30

How to Enter the #CoachBowmanContest

Step 1: Agree to Giveaway Terms (Bottom of this page)

Submissions will only be accepted if the Giveaway Terms have been accepted and submitted below.

Step 2: Download the Coach Bowman App

All submission must be captured using the Coach Bowman App. The Coach Bowman app is free to use. No payment is required to qualify for this contest.

Step 3: Capture Your Clip in the Coach Bowman App

Submissions videos must include the Coach Bowman watermark that the app generates. Use the Participate in Giveaway button while clipping. This will add the required overlay.

Step 4: Post on Instagram

Post your clip as a Reel, tag @coach.bowman.app, and include #CoachBowmanContest to complete your entry.

Additional Information

How Winners Are Picked

We pick the most creative, funny, or unique entries. It is not about the hardest skill or highest score.

How We Will Contact Winners

Winners will be messaged on Instagram. Be sure to follow @coach.bowman.app and have your DMs open. Winners are expected to respond within 48 hours to claim their prizes, and provide a photo for the winner announcement posts. If a winner does not respond within 48 hours, an alternate winner will be selected.

Required Giveaway Entry Form

To officially enter #CoachBowmanChallenge1, you must complete this form and agree to the Terms and Conditions.

Complete Your Required Entry

This legal form is required for giveaway eligibility. Entries without this form and Terms acceptance are not valid.
